## Strategic Pivot: Evryn Product First

Team agent build (Lucas) paused вЂ” not cancelled. Building Evryn product MVP (v0.2 "Gatekeeper's Inbox") for Mark (real-Mark = Mark Titus, Seattle filmmaker / Eva's Wild founder) first. See `evryn-backend/docs/BUILD-EVRYN-MVP.md`. Evryn is a broker, not a SaaS вЂ” surfaces connections from a gatekeeper's inbox; everyone is a "user," both sides pay per-connection.

## How AC works now

AC drives DC and QC as **subagents** (build/review loops), not hand-relayed mailbox notes. Protocol: `docs/protocols/ac-orchestration-protocol.md`. Subagent startup loading is standardized via the **Startup Context Cascade** (verbatim "read and faithfully follow" trigger + receipts watch on the task-specific additions), with **`#cascade-override`** the only guard-railed way to narrow a load (2026-06-06). QC verifies every real code change. **AC promotes QC's standing patterns** into QC's CLAUDE.md "Patterns This Role Watches For" section (QC can't write her own; new 2026-06-03). **Ping-by-default** on `#team-alerts`. Arch + BUILD docs: AC holds edit rights, **editing needs Justin's explicit auth first**.

## What's Next (critical path to Mark-live)

- **Context-architecture fixes: BUILT + QC-verified + DEPLOYED (AC1, 2026-06-08, `75fba9e`).** The live-test findings previously *routed* to Soren are now *shipped*: conversation history is runtime-owned (Evryn writes only the body; the runtime appends history once, labeled with real display-name + email, not "(user)"/UUID), the attached-history count is visible at `submit_draft` so Justin can verify it, plus a **double-send guard** (a re-approve after a successful send can't send twice) and **silent-failure alerts** (stale-check / approval-lookup / cron-checker DB errors now `notifyDev` instead of swallowing). Mira **PR #9** (identity tighten вЂ” create-from-zero gate + context-duplicate wording) merged; `core.md` history-claim scoped to the email/submit_draft path. Reviewed by **real DC + real QC** (the earlier generic-subagent review was redone properly вЂ” see AGENT_PATTERNS "Getting Subagents to Actually Load Their Context"). 2 minor non-blockers (drain-cooldown reset; stale collision help-string) в†’ SPRINT hardening list (week of 6/8).
- **Email-format + approval-flow polish: BUILT + QC-verified + DEPLOYED (AC1, 2026-06-09, `83fdd5e`).** The review/sent emails are cleaned up (review@ = classification в†’ draft в†’ context, printed *once*, newest-first; Mark's email = draft + the incoming forward only, no rolling history вЂ” fixes the ~7Г— reprint from `stripReplyChain` being a no-op on Gmail nested quotes). Bare approvals are now **single-route** (clean "Confirmed вЂ” sent," no hollow LLM follow-up; awareness preserved via the persisted records вЂ” **ADR-035 В§3 superseded**, amendment written). Direct-message review dedup + SDK typecheck cast (`npm run typecheck` green). Mira's 2 identity changes (`30d85f0` + Closing-the-Loop) rode the same deploy. DC built, AC+QC verified GO.
- **Oregon cutover: DONE (AC0 #2, 2026-06-04 eve).** Prod is now Oregon ("Evryn Product (West Coast)", ref `wvaaqwapueycyxyhxdnh`): 036 migration applied + verified, pre/post `pg_dump` taken (`backend/backups/oregon-{pre,post}-036-2026-06-04.sql`, untracked), Railway repointed в†’ Oregon, master (`1610f3b`) deployed + healthy (Supabase/Slack/polling confirmed). **Old East (`maruxkjwlfltlmureqkt`) still live вЂ” AC0 retires it once FULLY confident West is flawless; don't delete yet.** Apply mechanism: full-path PG17 psql + `SUPABASE_DB_URL_{PROD,DEV,EAST}` (see `backups/README.md`).
- **Dev/staging DB: UP (AC1, 2026-06-04).** `Evryn Product вЂ” Dev` (us-west-2, ref `maqkdesopsskptpxjbqs`) created + seeded as a **faithful mirror of prod** (5 tables, citext+vector, RLS, policies, comments, test data). Enables QC live-tests + **dev-first migrations**. Org now **Supabase Pro** (~$45/mo, 3 projects). `.env`: runtime = Oregon prod; admin DB urls `SUPABASE_DB_URL_PROD`/`_DEV`/`_EAST` (dev API creds in Bitwarden, not active `.env`). - **evryn-backend master (`1610f3b`) DEPLOYED to Oregon** (AC0 #2) вЂ” the validated bundle (EVR-71/68 + ADR-036 + Mira's triage beat + go-live reconciliation + AC1 DB/doc work). 036 column live on Oregon. `POLL_INTERVAL_MS=10000` (test cadence вЂ” slow at Mark-live); `SEND_ENABLED=true` (already on in prod); `TEST_RECIPIENT`/`NODE_ENV=development` = dead config (6/8 sweep).
